ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 重置为默认值

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default path for habits (folder or file). Can be overridden with "path" in code blocks.
ast.target: 习惯的默认路径（文件夹或文件）。可在代码块中使用 \"path\" 覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of days to display in the habit tracker. Can be overridden with "daysToShow" in code blocks.
ast.target: 习惯追踪器中显示的天数。可在代码块中使用 \"daysToShow\" 覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default habit color (hex, RGB, or CSS color name). Can be overridden with "color" in code blocks or habit frontmatter.
ast.target: 默认习惯颜色（十六进制、RGB 或 CSS 颜色名称）。可在代码块或习惯 frontmatter 中使用 \"color\" 覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display streak indicators and counts. Can be overridden with "showStreaks" in code blocks.
ast.target: 显示连续记录指示器和计数。可在代码块中使用 \"showStreaks\" 覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How gap days are displayed in streaks. Can be overridden with "gapStyle" in code blocks.
ast.target: 连续记录中间隔天数的显示方式。可在代码块中使用 \"gapStyle\" 覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Click a date in the header row to open the corresponding daily note. Requires the Daily Notes core plugin or Periodic Notes community plugin.
ast.target: 点击标题行中的日期可打开对应的每日笔记。需要 Daily Notes 核心插件或 Periodic Notes 社区插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make habit tracker match the width of the readable line length. Can be overridden with "matchLineLength" in code blocks.
ast.target: 使习惯追踪器的宽度与可读行长度匹配。可在代码块中使用 \"matchLineLength\" 覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debug output to console. Can be overridden with "debug" in code blocks.
ast.target: 启用控制台调试输出。可在代码块中使用 \"debug\" 覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset all settings to their default values
ast.target: 将所有设置重置为默认值

ast.target: 常规设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: These apply to all trackers and can be overridden either in the codeblock or in the habit tracker file.
ast.target: 这些设置适用于所有追踪器，并可在代码块或习惯追踪器文件中覆盖。
